title: Streaming Fulfillment Export
description: A high-volume operational export that proves the same schema model scales cleanly from buffered demos to streaming production workloads.
developerHook: Keep the same schema and authoring style when your export grows from hundreds to hundreds of thousands of rows.

preview.playgroundSummary: A high-volume export that keeps the same schema surface while switching to batch commits and bounded-memory workbook generation.
